data.four_set_effect: A character equipped with this Artifact set will obtain the Curiosity effect in the following conditions: When on the field, the character gains 1 stack after hitting an opponent with a Geo attack, triggering a maximum of once every 0.3s. When off the field, the character gains 1 stack every 3s. Curiosity can stack up to 4 times, each providing 6% DEF and a 6% Geo DMG Bonus. When 6 seconds pass without gaining a Curiosity stack, 1 stack is lost.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A small golden ornament with six petals that shall never wilt. It symbolizes the transience of mortal glories.
circlet_of_logos.title: Skeletal Hat

flower_of_life.desc: As far as Inazuma is concerned, this is some small object from overseas. The heart of this mechanism has been removed, and its hands no longer turn.
flower_of_life.title: Bloom Times

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A feather-shaped token that was brought forth from a secluded hall. The compassion of its creator led to it being left within that mansion along with a certain slumbering form.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Calabash of Awakening

plume_of_death.desc: A hat that once shielded a wanderer from sun and rain. It eventually became a convenient tool with which faces might be hidden and expressions obscured.
plume_of_death.title: Plume of Luxury

sands_of_eon.desc: A gourd that has been adorned with powdered gold and black paint. Its original color can no longer be discerned, but its main use seems to be as a performance prop.
sands_of_eon.title: Song of Life

list.desc: What he saw in his dream was a phantom dancing to the music under the moonlight,</br>Just like the young man in the distant past, who was akin to a blank sheet of paper,</br>And like a pure yet fragile persona,</br>Emerging once the resentment and suffering had dissipated.</br>The wanderer did not know that he had any faculties for dreaming,</br>Thinking that this must have been the researchers' little trick,</br>Or perhaps it was the infinitesimal resistance of that bygone heart.</br>"You once acquired the 'heart' that you always dreamed of,"</br>"But it was but a mere prop for lies and deception."</br>"Now, you will finally obtain what belongs to you,"</br>"And this false construct of a body can at last aspire to power over this world."</br>"Yet, this is all but a fleeting dream of glory."</br>"And it will all one day drift away amidst the sighs of a suffering earth..."</br>Was it a "him" from the past who said this? Or "him" from the future?</br>The vagrant cared not, for when he awakened,</br>It was not he, but that ethereal future that dissipated.</br>
list.title: Bloom Times

list.desc: "Where are you going, wanderer?"</br>The roving youth was stopped by a child's shout.</br>That was a child of a Tatarasuna crafts-person, and while he was ill, his eyes were still clear.</br>The youth told the child that he was bound for Inazuma City.</br>"But it's raining really hard right now. They say that the people who left haven't returned!"</br>The youth opened and closed his mouth a few times... But at last could only give the child a small smile.</br>The next time he set foot upon that island, that child was nowhere to be found.</br>"Where are you going, Inazuman? This boat is not for you!"</br>The wandering young man was halted at the harbor by a boatman.</br>But before the youth could draw his blade, a man in his company stopped him.</br>The man told the mariner that the outlander youth was with him.</br>"Ah, so he's your guest, sir? My apologies for my presumption."</br>The man gave the youth a coat to keep the cold out, but the youth shook his head.</br>He had no need of such things — he only wished to know what interesting things he might find on this long journey.</br>"Lord Harbinger. Where are you headed?"</br>The youth, hating chatty humans the most, gave his subordinate a backhand slap.</br>But he also loved watching expressions of terror and helplessness play across human faces,</br>And it was perhaps precisely because of this imbecilic underling's expressiveness that he had kept them around.</br>He told the groveling, quailing figure that they were headed east, for Mondstadt.</br>"I understand! I'll get your bodyguards ready right now!"</br>He had no need of guards, of course, but he was lazier still to barter words with cretins.</br>Donning his wanderer's hat, he headed eastward alone.</br>"Child, where are you going?"</br>Returning home, the youth was stopped at the roadside by an old woman.</br>He told her that he was going west.</br>"To Yashiori Island, then? What business are you on?"</br>She had said this thoughtlessly, knowing only that things had not been peaceful of late.</br>The youth thanked her for her concern with earnest smile and told her that he was bound for an appointed meeting.</br>As the boat gradually approached the shore, a lady in foreign garb could be seen standing by the shoreline,</br>And she threw a small crystal sphere at the youth from afar.</br>Catching it with ease, he lifted it up to the dying, bloodied sun.</br>
list.title: Skeletal Hat

list.desc: Amenoma, Futsu, Isshin, Hyakume, Senju.</br>These were, once upon a time, the five branches of the Raiden Gokaden,</br>But today, only Amenoma still maintains its line of succession.</br>While the Isshin line can just barely be said to have extant descendants.</br>In the eyes of the people, this is just the natural result of the ravages of time.</br>They never once suspected that such sudden falls from grace might have some hidden mystery behind them.</br>The wanderer would never admit to this.</br>He would never admit that he had done this as an act of revenge against the bladesmith.</br>Nor would he ever mention the truth,</br>That he had abandoned his schemes halfway because they had suddenly become dull.</br>He would only say, in that tone of voice he had learned from a certain researcher:</br>"It was all just a little experiment into human nature."</br>In Inazuma's traditional theater, there is a certain character known as "Kunikuzushi."</br>Such characters are often schemers and usurpers of nations.</br>At the end of his wanderings, he chose this name as an act of his own will.</br>And as for the name he had once used, even he no longer remembered it.</br>It is a norm in Inazuma's traditional theater to join the names of a play's three acts together to form the play's name.</br>For example, "Sumirezome," "Sangetsu," and "Kogetsukan" come together,</br>Thus forming the play "Sumirezome Sangetsu Kogetsukan."</br>Perhaps a day will come when this body's adventures, its experiences,</br>Will become tales to be passed along by mortals, distant memories that flow through the ley lines.</br>But for now, his three acts are still ongoing.</br>
list.title: Calabash of Awakening

list.desc: The long-wandering eccentric no longer thinks about this,</br>But when he closes his eyes, he can still see the moonlit nights over Tatarasuna and the burning furnace flames.</br>The kind young deputy said:</br>"This gold ornament is a proof of identity granted by the Almighty Shogun,"</br>"But as you travel the world, please bear this in mind,"</br>"Never to reveal your identity to others."</br>The upright Inspector said:</br>"This gold ornament may be a proof of identity granted by the Almighty Shogun,"</br>"But you are neither man nor mechanism,"</br>"And so I can only deal with you in this fashion. Do not hold this against me!"</br>The wanderer who has left yesterday in the dust no longer thinks about it,</br>But when he covers his ears, he can still hear the wild winds that roared that year.</br>A pair of expectant eyes said:</br>"This gold ornament is a proof of identity granted by the Almighty Shogun,"</br>"It must surely be able to save the people."</br>The intelligent, lovely shrine maiden said:</br>"This gold ornament is a proof of identity granted by the Almighty Shogun,"</br>"And she will not abandon you."</br>"As for me, I shall do my best to send for help immediately..."</br>...But in the end, the golden arrow-feather were covered in dust,</br>And all tales were incinerated in karmic flames till nothing remained.</br>
list.title: Plume of Luxury

list.desc: He was originally born to be a vessel for a "heart."</br>But he shed tears in his dreams.</br>His creator observed thus:</br>He was too fragile, whether it be as a human or as a tool.</br>Yet his creator would not destroy him, and so allowed him to continue slumbering.</br>In her latter works, she would also consign designs that might store such a heart to obsolescence.</br>Not long after, that noblest and most prestigious "proof" in the world would come to have no home,</br>And thus was sent to the great shrine at Mt. Yougou.</br>Later, the beautiful puppet awoke and began his wanderings.</br>He observed many a heart,</br>Good ones, upright ones, strong ones, gentle ones...</br>The puppet, too, desired a heart.</br>Later, the lovely puppet would finally obtain that "heart."</br>It was, after all, his purpose for being, the very reason he existed.</br>Yet, it was not what the puppet truly desired,</br>For it did not contain any blessings,</br>But was instead a sacrifice brimming with selfishness, hypocrisy, cunning and curses,</br>All wrapped in an amiable husk.</br>Good and evil were the song of sentient life, useless and cacophonous.</br>But if he were to wrench this "heart" out,</br>He would no longer be able to feel anything at all...</br>
list.title: Song of Life
